'''batava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wadeite|wadeite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wadeite|wadeite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| batava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bætævæth|bætævæth]] || [[word:bætævæj|bætævæj]] || [[word:bætævæsh|bætævæsh]] || [[word:bætævæ|bætævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:batatavath|batatavath]] || [[word:batatavaj|batatavaj]] || [[word:batatavash|batatavash]] || [[word:batatava|batatava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:batavath|batavath]] || [[word:batavaj|batavaj]] || [[word:batavash|batavash]] || [[word:batava|batava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:batafvath|batafvath]] || [[word:batafvaj|batafvaj]] || [[word:batafvash|batafvash]] || [[word:batafvaf|batafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:batavatha|batavatha]] || [[word:batavaja|batavaja]] || [[word:batavasha|batavasha]] || [[word:batavaka|batavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:batavath|batavath]] || [[word:batavaj|batavaj]] || [[word:batavash|batavash]] || [[word:batava|batava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:batavathal|batavathal]] || [[word:batavajal|batavajal]] || [[word:batavashal|batavashal]] || [[word:batavakal|batavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:batavathatha|batavathatha]] || [[word:batavajaja|batavajaja]] || [[word:batavashasha|batavashasha]] || [[word:batavaka|batavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:batavathan|batavathan]] || [[word:batavajan|batavajan]] || [[word:batavashan|batavashan]] || [[word:batavakan|batavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:batavathaoro|batavathaoro]] || [[word:batavajaoro|batavajaoro]] || [[word:batavashaoro|batavashaoro]] || [[word:batavakaoro|batavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
